/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libvs_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.so -o rosidl_generator_py/vs_msgs/libvs_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.so CMakeFiles/vs_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/vs_msgs/msg/_cone_location_s.c.o CMakeFiles/vs_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/vs_msgs/msg/_cone_location_pixel_s.c.o CMakeFiles/vs_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/vs_msgs/msg/_parking_error_s.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/root/racecar_ws/build/vs_msgs:/opt/ros/humble/lib: /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libpython3.10.so libvs_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so libvs_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
